author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more Tier-3s (DRM GEM + USB URB):

- drivers/gpu/drm/gem-core.md: covers drm_gem.c (~1800 lines) — GEM (Graphics Execution Manager) buffer-object framework: per-driver drm_gem_object + funcs vtable (free/pin/unpin/get_sg_table/vmap/vunmap/mmap/evict/rss/print_info), per-FD handle table (xarray) mapping u32 handle → Arc<Object>, per-object mmap-offset allocator via drm_vma_offset_node, PRIME export (handle_to_dmabuf_fd) + import (dmabuf_fd_to_handle) for cross-driver buffer share, per-helper backends (drm_gem_dma_helper for SoC display + drm_gem_shmem_helper for system memory + drm_gem_ttm_helper bridge to TTM + drm_gem_vram_helper for simple VRAM), per-object dma_resv (reservation object for exclusive+shared dma_fence list), ww-mutex chain via drm_gem_lock_reservations for multi-object atomic operations, dumb-buffer support (DRM_IOCTL_MODE_CREATE_DUMB minimal portable API). 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + handle-uniqueness + mmap-offset-uniqueness + prime-no-double-export + mmap-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to gem_dmabuf.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus export↔import round-trip.
- drivers/usb/core-urb.md: covers drivers/usb/core/{urb,message}.c — URB (USB Request Block) submission + completion + cancellation: struct urb layout source-compat for in-tree drivers (every documented field preserved), control/bulk/interrupt/isochronous transfer types, usb_submit_urb validation + DMA-map + HCD enqueue, completion callback via usb_hcd_giveback_urb (called exactly once per submit even on error/cancel), usb_unlink_urb non-blocking cancel, usb_kill_urb blocking cancel + wait, usb_poison_urb perma-cancel + reject re-submit, URB-anchor batch-cancel for driver-disconnect (usb_kill_anchored_urbs), per-pipe encode/decode helpers, synchronous wrappers (usb_control_msg + _bulk_msg + _interrupt_msg with default 5000ms timeout), usb_set_configuration + interface registration triggering per-class driver bind. 12 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (UAF + complete-called-exactly-once + transfer-buffer-OOB + pipe-decode-OOB) / Layer-2 ref to urb_lifetime.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus submit↔complete round-trip.

Total state: 258 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 24 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main + bpf-verifier + vfio-pci-core + xhci + pci-access + intel-iommu + nvme-host-pci + drm-gem-core + usb-core-urb.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-gpu-drm-gem-core, design-drivers-usb-core-urb.

Next iter plan: kernel/sched/core.md (scheduler core dispatch loop — most-cross-referenced kernel function) + drivers/gpu/drm/scheduler.md (drm_sched generic GPU job scheduler — referenced by amdgpu/etnaviv/lima/msm/panfrost/v3d).
